name: Post-Specialization Career Displacement
description: Highly skilled professionals (journalists, CS grads, tech leads) are finding their specific degrees and experience are failing them in the current market, leading to 'status plummeting'—where a 43-year-old editor must work as a waiter or a 22-year-old CS grad remains unemployed at home.
pain_points: Inability to land first interviews despite 150+ applications
Loss of professional identity during unemployment
Difficulty translating legacy skills (Journalism) to new income streams
